subcodes.first_line: O herald of the mention of God! Thy letter hath been received and the details of the incident have become known, that in the path of that innocent one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی بذکر حق نامه رسید و تفصیل واقعه معلوم گردید که در راه آن بی گناه
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @poems and quotation from poetry
